763            ],
764
765            // --- NEWSLETTER ---
766            'agnosis_newsletter_from_name' => [
767                'tab'   => 'newsletter',
768                'label' => __( 'Sender name', 'agnosis' ),
769                'desc'  => __( 'Name shown as the sender of digest emails. Leave blank to use the site name.', 'agnosis' ),
770            ],
771            'agnosis_newsletter_from_email' => [
772                'tab'      => 'newsletter',
773                'label'    => __( 'Sender email address', 'agnosis' ),
774                'sanitize' => 'sanitize_email',
775                'desc'     => __( 'Dedicated From: address for both newsletters, e.g. newsletter@agnosis.art — keeps digest mail separate from the site\'s admin email for deliverability and so artists can filter it. Leave blank to use the admin email. Must be a valid, deliverable address on your domain (SPF/DKIM configured) or messages may be marked as spam.', 'agnosis' ),
776            ],
777            'agnosis_newsletter_artist_enabled' => [
778                'tab'     => 'newsletter',
779                'label'   => __( 'Artist newsletter', 'agnosis' ),
780                'input'   => 'checkbox',
781                'default' => '1',
782                'desc'    => __( 'Admitted artists are auto-enrolled (they can unsubscribe from any issue with one click). Community digest: recent activity, new members, open votes.', 'agnosis' ),
783            ],
784            'agnosis_newsletter_artist_frequency_days' => [
785                'tab'      => 'newsletter',
786                'label'    => __( 'Artist newsletter frequency (days)', 'agnosis' ),
787                'input'    => 'number',
788                'default'  => 30,
789                'min'      => 1,
790                'type'     => 'integer',
791                'sanitize' => fn( $v ) => max( 1, (int) $v ),
792                'desc'     => __( 'Default 30 ≈ monthly. A new issue is prepared once this many days have passed since the last one was sent.', 'agnosis' ),
793            ],
794            'agnosis_newsletter_artist_intro' => [
795                'tab'   => 'newsletter',
796                'label' => __( 'Artist newsletter intro', 'agnosis' ),
797                'input' => 'textarea',
798                'rows'  => 4,
799                'desc'  => __( 'Optional note prepended to the next artist issue only — cleared automatically once that issue is queued. Leave blank to send the auto-digest with no intro.', 'agnosis' ),
800            ],
801            'agnosis_newsletter_public_enabled' => [
802                'tab'     => 'newsletter',
803                'label'   => __( 'Public newsletter', 'agnosis' ),
804                'input'   => 'checkbox',
805                'default' => '1',
806                'desc'    => __( 'Visitors subscribe via the agnosis/newsletter-signup block (double opt-in). Digest: new artwork and events published since the last issue.', 'agnosis' ),
807            ],
808            'agnosis_newsletter_public_frequency_days' => [
809                'tab'      => 'newsletter',
810                'label'    => __( 'Public newsletter frequency (days)', 'agnosis' ),
811                'input'    => 'number',
812                'default'  => 30,
813                'min'      => 1,
814                'type'     => 'integer',
815                'sanitize' => fn( $v ) => max( 1, (int) $v ),
816                'desc'     => __( 'Default 30 ≈ monthly.', 'agnosis' ),
817            ],
818            'agnosis_newsletter_public_intro' => [
819                'tab'   => 'newsletter',
820                'label' => __( 'Public newsletter intro', 'agnosis' ),
821                'input' => 'textarea',
822                'rows'  => 4,
823                'desc'  => __( 'Optional note prepended to the next public issue only — cleared automatically once that issue is queued.', 'agnosis' ),
824            ],
825            'agnosis_newsletter_batch_size' => [
826                'tab'      => 'newsletter',
827                'label'    => __( 'Send batch size', 'agnosis' ),
828                'input'    => 'number',
829                'default'  => 20,
830                'min'      => 1,
831                'type'     => 'integer',
832                'sanitize' => fn( $v ) => max( 1, (int) $v ),
833                'desc'     => __( 'Recipients emailed per 5-minute cron tick. Lower this if your host throttles outbound mail; raise it for faster delivery on hosts with generous limits.', 'agnosis' ),
834            ],
835            'agnosis_newsletter_subscriber_warn_threshold' => [
836                'tab'      => 'newsletter',
837                'label'    => __( 'Self-hosting comfort threshold', 'agnosis' ),
838                'input'    => 'number',
839                'default'  => 250,
840                'min'      => 1,
841                'type'     => 'integer',
842                'sanitize' => fn( $v ) => max( 1, (int) $v ),
843                'desc'     => __( 'Advisory only — self-hosted sending keeps working above this count. Once confirmed public subscribers pass it, this page shows a reminder to consider an email service provider (e.g. Brevo\'s free tier) instead.', 'agnosis' ),
844            ],
845            'agnosis_invitation_intro' => [
846                'tab'     => 'newsletter',
847                'label'   => __( 'Invitation intro', 'agnosis' ),
848                'input'   => 'textarea',
849                'rows'    => 6,
850                'default' => __(
851                    "Agnosis is a small, self-hosted home for artists who'd rather make work than manage a platform. There's no algorithm deciding who sees your art, no portfolio site to maintain, and no account to configure — just your work, published and translated automatically for a global audience.\n\nBeing part of the community is refreshingly simple: once admitted, you submit new work by sending it as an email — no dashboard, no forms. Fellow artists vouch for new applicants, and everyone keeps full ownership of what they publish; you can leave at any time and take your work with you.",
852                    'agnosis'
853                ),
854                'desc'    => __( 'Shown near the top of the "Send Invitation" email below (an "Apply to join" link and site name follow automatically — no need to add either here). Two or three short paragraphs is plenty. Standing copy, not cleared after use like the newsletter intros above — translated automatically when an invitation is sent in a language other than the site\'s own.', 'agnosis' ),
855            ],
856        ];
857    }
858
859    private function render_ai_test_tools(): void {
860        $providers = [
861            'openai'    => [
862                'label' => 'OpenAI',
863                'desc'  => __( 'Sends a minimal ping ("Reply with the word: ping") using the configured API key.', 'agnosis' ),
864            ],
865            'anthropic' => [
866                'label' => 'Anthropic',
867                'desc'  => __( 'Sends a minimal ping using the configured API key.', 'agnosis' ),
868            ],
869            'wp_ai'     => [
870                'label' => __( 'WordPress AI Client', 'agnosis' ),
871                'desc'  => __( 'Checks that wp_ai_client_prompt() is available (WordPress 7.0+) and a text-generation model is configured.', 'agnosis' ),
872            ],
873        ];
874        ?>
875        <div class="card" style="max-width:800px;margin-top:1.5rem;padding:1rem 1.5rem">
876            <h2 style="margin-top:0"><?php esc_html_e( 'Test AI Providers', 'agnosis' ); ?></h2>
877            <table class="form-table" role="presentation" style="margin-bottom:0"><tbody>
878                <?php foreach ( $providers as $slug => $info ) : ?>
879                <tr>
880                    <th scope="row"><?php echo esc_html( $info['label'] ); ?></th>
881                    <td>
882                        <button type="button"
883                            class="button button-secondary agnosis-test-ai"
884                            data-provider="<?php echo esc_attr( $slug ); ?>"
885                            data-nonce="<?php echo esc_attr( wp_create_nonce( 'agnosis_test_ai' ) ); ?>">
886                            <?php
887                            printf(
888                                /* translators: %s: provider label */
889                                esc_html__( 'Test %s', 'agnosis' ),
890                                esc_html( $info['label'] )
891                            );
892                            ?>
893                        </button>
894                        <span class="agnosis-test-result" data-provider="<?php echo esc_attr( $slug ); ?>"
895                              style="margin-left:.8rem;font-style:italic;color:#666"></span>
896                        <p class="description"><?php echo esc_html( $info['desc'] ); ?></p>
897                    </td>
898                </tr>
899                <?php endforeach; ?>
900            </tbody></table>
901        </div>
902        <?php
903    }
904
905    private function render_logs_tab(): void {
906        // phpcs:ignore WordPress.Security.NonceVerification.Recommended -- integer page offset for display only.
907        $page    = max( 1, (int) sanitize_key( wp_unslash( $_GET['log_page'] ?? '1' ) ) );
908        $per     = 50;
909        $offset  = ( $page - 1 ) * $per;
910        $total   = Logger::count();
911        $entries = Logger::get_entries( $per, $offset );
912        $pages   = (int) ceil( $total / $per );
913
914        $level_colours = [
915            'info'    => '#0a7c48',
916            'warning' => '#8a6d3b',
917            'error'   => '#c0392b',
918        ];
919        $level_bg = [
920            'info'    => '#ecfdf5',
921            'warning' => '#fef9e7',
922            'error'   => '#fdf2f2',
923        ];
924
925        ?>
926        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:1rem;margin-bottom:1rem">
927            <h2 style="margin:0"><?php esc_html_e( 'Pipeline Logs', 'agnosis' ); ?></h2>
928            <form method="post" action="<?php echo esc_url( admin_url( 'admin-post.php' ) ); ?>">
929                <input type="hidden" name="action" value="agnosis_clear_logs">
930                <?php wp_nonce_field( 'agnosis_clear_logs' ); ?>
931                <button type="submit" class="button button-secondary"
932                    onclick="return confirm('<?php echo esc_js( __( 'Clear all log entries?', 'agnosis' ) ); ?>')">
933                    <?php esc_html_e( 'Clear All', 'agnosis' ); ?>
934                </button>
935            </form>
936        </div>
937
938        <p class="description" style="margin-bottom:1rem">
939            <?php
940            printf(
941                /* translators: %d: total log entry count */
942                esc_html__( '%d entries total. Logs are pruned automatically according to the Inbox retention setting.', 'agnosis' ),
943                (int) $total
944            );
945            ?>
946        </p>
947
948        <?php if ( empty( $entries ) ) : ?>
949            <p><?php esc_html_e( 'No log entries yet.', 'agnosis' ); ?></p>
950        <?php else : ?>
951            <table class="widefat striped" style="max-width:1200px">
952                <thead>
953                    <tr>
954                        <th style="width:160px"><?php esc_html_e( 'Time', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
955                        <th style="width:80px"><?php esc_html_e( 'Level', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
956                        <th style="width:120px"><?php esc_html_e( 'Context', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
957                        <th><?php esc_html_e( 'Message', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
958                    </tr>
959                </thead>
960                <tbody>
961                    <?php
962                    foreach ( $entries as $entry ) :
963                        $lvl = $entry['level'] ?? 'info';
964                        $bg  = $level_bg[ $lvl ]  ?? '';
965                        $fg  = $level_colours[ $lvl ] ?? '#000';
966                        ?>
967                        <tr style="background:<?php echo esc_attr( $bg ); ?>">
968                            <td style="white-space:nowrap;font-family:monospace;font-size:.85em">
969                                <?php echo esc_html( $entry['created_at'] ); ?>
970                            </td>
971                            <td>
972                                <span style="color:<?php echo esc_attr( $fg ); ?>;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;font-size:.8em">
973                                    <?php echo esc_html( $lvl ); ?>
974                                </span>
975                            </td>
976                            <td style="font-family:monospace;font-size:.85em;color:#555">
977                                <?php echo esc_html( $entry['context'] ); ?>
978                            </td>
979                            <td><?php echo esc_html( $entry['message'] ); ?></td>
980                        </tr>
981                    <?php endforeach; ?>
982                </tbody>
983            </table>
984
985            <?php if ( $pages > 1 ) : ?>
986                <div style="margin-top:1rem">
987                    <?php for ( $p = 1; $p <= $pages; $p++ ) : ?>
988                        <?php if ( $p === $page ) : ?>
989                            <strong>[<?php echo (int) $p; ?>]</strong>
990                        <?php else : ?>
991                            <a href="<?php echo esc_url( add_query_arg( [ 'page' => 'agnosis-settings', 'tab' => 'logs', 'log_page' => $p ], admin_url( 'admin.php' ) ) ); ?>">
992                                <?php echo (int) $p; ?>
993                            </a>
994                        <?php endif; ?>
995                    <?php endfor; ?>
996                </div>
997            <?php endif; ?>
998        <?php endif; ?>
999        <?php
1000    }
1001
1002    private function render_tab_tools( string $tab ): void {
1003        if ( 'ai' === $tab ) {
1004            $this->render_ai_test_tools();
1005            return;
1006        }
1007        if ( 'network' === $tab ) {
1008            $this->render_admission_dashboard();
1009            $this->render_members_dashboard();
1010            return;
1011        }
1012        if ( 'newsletter' === $tab ) {
1013            $this->render_newsletter_dashboard();
1014            $this->render_invitation_card();
1015            return;
1016        }
1017        if ( 'email' !== $tab ) {
1018            return;
1019        }
1020        ?>
1021        <div class="card" style="max-width:800px;margin-top:1.5rem;padding:1rem 1.5rem">
1022            <h2 style="margin-top:0"><?php esc_html_e( 'Inbox Tools', 'agnosis' ); ?></h2>
1023
1024            <table class="form-table" role="presentation" style="margin-bottom:0"><tbody>
1025                <tr>
1026                    <th scope="row"><?php esc_html_e( 'Test connection', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
1027                    <td>
1028                        <form method="post" action="<?php echo esc_url( admin_url( 'admin-post.php' ) ); ?>">
1029                            <input type="hidden" name="action" value="agnosis_test_inbox">
1030                            <?php wp_nonce_field( 'agnosis_test_inbox' ); ?>
1031                            <?php submit_button( __( 'Test IMAP Connection', 'agnosis' ), 'primary', 'submit', false ); ?>
1032                        </form>
1033                        <p class="description"><?php esc_html_e( 'Connects to the configured mailbox and reports the total and unseen message count.', 'agnosis' ); ?></p>
1034                    </td>
1035                </tr>
1036                <tr>
1037                    <th scope="row"><?php esc_html_e( 'Poll inbox now', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
1038                    <td>
1039                        <form method="post" action="<?php echo esc_url( admin_url( 'admin-post.php' ) ); ?>">
1040                            <input type="hidden" name="action" value="agnosis_poll_now">
1041                            <?php wp_nonce_field( 'agnosis_poll_now' ); ?>
1042                            <?php submit_button( __( 'Poll Inbox Now', 'agnosis' ), 'primary', 'submit', false ); ?>
1043                        </form>
1044                        <p class="description"><?php esc_html_e( 'Fetches unseen messages immediately without waiting for WP-Cron. Then click "Process Pending Queue" to run the AI pipeline.', 'agnosis' ); ?></p>
1045                    </td>
1046                </tr>
1047                <tr>
1048                    <th scope="row"><?php esc_html_e( 'Process queue', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
1049                    <td>
1050                        <form method="post" action="<?php echo esc_url( admin_url( 'admin-post.php' ) ); ?>">
1051                            <input type="hidden" name="action" value="agnosis_process_queue">
1052                            <?php wp_nonce_field( 'agnosis_process_queue' ); ?>
1053                            <?php submit_button( __( 'Process Pending Queue', 'agnosis' ), 'primary', 'submit', false ); ?>
1054                        </form>
1055                        <p class="description"><?php esc_html_e( 'Immediately runs the AI pipeline on all pending queue items without waiting for WP-Cron. Use this to test the end-to-end flow after a poll.', 'agnosis' ); ?></p>
1056                    </td>
1057                </tr>
1058                <tr>
1059                    <th scope="row"><?php esc_html_e( 'Force reprocess', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
1060                    <td>
1061                        <form method="post" action="<?php echo esc_url( admin_url( 'admin-post.php' ) ); ?>">
1062                            <input type="hidden" name="action" value="agnosis_force_reprocess">
1063                            <?php wp_nonce_field( 'agnosis_force_reprocess' ); ?>
1064                            <?php submit_button( __( 'Force Reprocess Inbox', 'agnosis' ), 'secondary', 'submit', false ); ?>
1065                        </form>
1066                        <p class="description"><?php esc_html_e( 'Resets failed/stuck/orphaned queue rows back to pending, then immediately polls for unprocessed messages. Then click "Process Pending Queue" to run the AI pipeline. Already-published artworks with valid posts are never re-processed.', 'agnosis' ); ?></p>
1067                    </td>
1068                </tr>
1069            </tbody></table>
1070        </div>
1071        <?php
1072    }
1073
1074
1075    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
1076    // Admission dashboard (Network tab)
1077    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
1078
1079    /**
1080     * Render the pending applications table on the Network tab.
1081     *
1082     * Shows every application in status='pending' with vouch counts and
1083     * admin-override Admit / Reject buttons.
1084     */
1085    private function render_admission_dashboard(): void {
1086        global $wpdb;
1087
1088        $admission = new Admission();
1089        $required  = $admission->calculate_required();
1090
1091        // phpcs:ignore WordPress.DB.DirectDatabaseQuery.DirectQuery, WordPress.DB.DirectDatabaseQuery.NoCaching
1092        $applications = $wpdb->get_results(
1093            "SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}agnosis_applications
1094             WHERE status = 'pending'
1095             ORDER BY applied_at ASC"
1096        );
1097
1098        ?>
1099        <div class="card" style="max-width:900px;margin-top:1.5rem;padding:1rem 1.5rem">
1100            <h2 style="margin-top:0"><?php esc_html_e( 'Pending Applications', 'agnosis' ); ?></h2>
1101
1102            <?php if ( empty( $applications ) ) : ?>
1103                <p style="color:#666"><?php esc_html_e( 'No pending applications.', 'agnosis' ); ?></p>
1104            <?php else : ?>
1105                <p class="description" style="margin-bottom:1rem">
1106                    <?php
1107                    printf(
1108                        /* translators: %d: number of positive votes currently required for admission */
1109                        esc_html__( '%d positive vote(s) currently required for admission.', 'agnosis' ),
1110                        (int) $required
1111                    );
1112                    ?>
1113                </p>
1114                <table class="widefat striped" style="border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden">
1115                    <thead>
1116                        <tr>
1117                            <th><?php esc_html_e( 'Applicant', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
1118                            <th><?php esc_html_e( 'Applied', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
1119                            <th><?php esc_html_e( 'Votes', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
1120                            <th><?php esc_html_e( 'Bio / Portfolio', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
1121                            <th><?php esc_html_e( 'Actions', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
1122                        </tr>
1123                    </thead>
1124                    <tbody>
1125                    <?php foreach ( $applications as $app ) : ?>
1126                        <?php
1127                        /** @var object{id: string, display_name: string, email: string, applied_at: string, bio: string|null, portfolio_url: string|null} $app */
1128                        $app_id  = (int) $app->id;
1129                        $yes     = $admission->count_positive_vouches( $app_id );
1130                        $bar_pct = $required > 0 ? min( 100, (int) round( $yes / $required * 100 ) ) : 100;
1131                        $bar_col = $yes >= $required ? '#00a32a' : '#2271b1';
1132                        ?>
1133                        <tr>
1134                            <td>
1135                                <strong><?php echo esc_html( $app->display_name ); ?></strong><br>
1136                                <span style="color:#666;font-size:12px"><?php echo esc_html( $app->email ); ?></span>
1137                            </td>
1138                            <td style="white-space:nowrap"><?php echo esc_html( date_i18n( get_option( 'date_format' ), strtotime( $app->applied_at ) ) ); ?></td>
1139                            <td style="min-width:120px">
1140                                <div style="background:#ddd;border-radius:3px;height:6px;margin-bottom:4px">
1141                                    <div style="background:<?php echo esc_attr( $bar_col ); ?>;width:<?php echo esc_attr( (string) $bar_pct ); ?>%;height:6px;border-radius:3px"></div>
1142                                </div>
1143                                <?php
1144                                printf(
1145                                    /* translators: 1: yes votes received, 2: total votes required */
1146                                    esc_html__( '%1$d / %2$d', 'agnosis' ),
1147                                    (int) $yes,
1148                                    (int) $required
1149                                );
1150                                ?>
1151                            </td>
1152                            <td style="max-width:260px;font-size:12px">
1153                                <?php if ( $app->bio ) : ?>
1154                                    <span title="<?php echo esc_attr( $app->bio ); ?>"><?php echo esc_html( wp_trim_words( $app->bio, 20 ) ); ?></span>
1155                                <?php endif; ?>
1156                                <?php if ( $app->portfolio_url ) : ?>
1157                                    <br><a href="<?php echo esc_url( $app->portfolio_url ); ?>" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><?php esc_html_e( 'Portfolio ↗', 'agnosis' ); ?></a>
1158                                <?php endif; ?>
1159                            </td>
1160                            <td style="white-space:nowrap">
1161                                <!-- Admit -->
1162                                <form method="post" action="<?php echo esc_url( admin_url( 'admin-post.php' ) ); ?>" style="display:inline">
1163                                    <input type="hidden" name="action" value="agnosis_admit_application">
1164                                    <input type="hidden" name="application_id" value="<?php echo esc_attr( (string) $app_id ); ?>">
1165                                    <?php wp_nonce_field( 'agnosis_admit_' . $app_id, 'agnosis_nonce' ); ?>
1166                                    <?php submit_button( __( 'Admit', 'agnosis' ), 'small', 'submit', false ); ?>
1167                                </form>
1168                                <!-- Reject -->
1169                                <form method="post" action="<?php echo esc_url( admin_url( 'admin-post.php' ) ); ?>" style="display:inline;margin-left:4px">
1170                                    <input type="hidden" name="action" value="agnosis_reject_application">
1171                                    <input type="hidden" name="application_id" value="<?php echo esc_attr( (string) $app_id ); ?>">
1172                                    <?php wp_nonce_field( 'agnosis_reject_' . $app_id, 'agnosis_nonce' ); ?>
1173                                    <?php submit_button( __( 'Reject', 'agnosis' ), 'small delete', 'submit', false ); ?>
1174                                </form>
1175                            </td>
1176                        </tr>
1177                    <?php endforeach; ?>
1178                    </tbody>
1179                </table>
1180            <?php endif; ?>
1181        </div>
1182        <?php
1183    }
1184
1185    /**
1186     * admin-post handler: admit an applicant, bypassing the vouch threshold.
1187     */
1188    public function handle_admit_application(): void {
1189        $app_id = absint( wp_unslash( $_POST['application_id'] ?? 0 ) );
1190
1191        check_admin_referer( 'agnosis_admit_' . $app_id, 'agnosis_nonce' );
1192
1193        if ( ! current_user_can( 'manage_options' ) ) {
1194            wp_die( esc_html__( 'You do not have permission to perform this action.', 'agnosis' ) );
1195        }
1196
1197        $admission = new Admission();
1198        $ok        = $admission->admin_admit( $app_id );
1199
1200        $redirect = add_query_arg(
1201            [
1202                'page'            => 'agnosis-settings',
1203                'tab'             => 'network',
1204                'agnosis_message' => $ok ? 'admitted' : 'admit_failed',
1205            ],
1206            admin_url( 'admin.php' )
1207        );
1208
1209        wp_safe_redirect( $redirect );
1210        exit;
1211    }
1212
1213    /**
1214     * admin-post handler: reject an applicant.
1215     */
1216    public function handle_reject_application(): void {
1217        $app_id = absint( wp_unslash( $_POST['application_id'] ?? 0 ) );
1218
1219        check_admin_referer( 'agnosis_reject_' . $app_id, 'agnosis_nonce' );
1220
1221        if ( ! current_user_can( 'manage_options' ) ) {
1222            wp_die( esc_html__( 'You do not have permission to perform this action.', 'agnosis' ) );
1223        }
1224
1225        $admission = new Admission();
1226        $ok        = $admission->admin_reject( $app_id );
1227
1228        $redirect = add_query_arg(
1229            [
1230                'page'            => 'agnosis-settings',
1231                'tab'             => 'network',
1232                'agnosis_message' => $ok ? 'rejected' : 'reject_failed',
1233            ],
1234            admin_url( 'admin.php' )
1235        );
1236
1237        wp_safe_redirect( $redirect );
1238        exit;
1239    }
1240
1241    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
1242    // Members dashboard (Network tab)
1243    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
1244
1245    /**
1246     * Render the admitted (and banned) members table on the Network tab.
1247     *
1248     * Shows every admitted/banned artist with Ban / Delete / Initiate Vote actions.
1249     */
1250    private function render_members_dashboard(): void {
1251        global $wpdb;
1252
1253        // phpcs:ignore WordPress.DB.DirectDatabaseQuery.DirectQuery, WordPress.DB.DirectDatabaseQuery.NoCaching
1254        $members = $wpdb->get_results(
1255            "SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}agnosis_applications
1256             WHERE status IN ('admitted', 'banned')
1257             ORDER BY display_name ASC"
1258        );
1259
1260        ?>
1261        <div class="card" style="max-width:960px;margin-top:1.5rem;padding:1rem 1.5rem">
1262            <h2 style="margin-top:0"><?php esc_html_e( 'Members', 'agnosis' ); ?></h2>
1263
1264            <?php if ( empty( $members ) ) : ?>
1265                <p style="color:#666"><?php esc_html_e( 'No admitted members yet.', 'agnosis' ); ?></p>
1266            <?php else : ?>
1267                <table class="widefat striped" style="border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden">
1268                    <thead>
1269                        <tr>
1270                            <th><?php esc_html_e( 'Artist', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
1271                            <th><?php esc_html_e( 'Status', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
1272                            <th><?php esc_html_e( 'Joined', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
1273                            <th><?php esc_html_e( 'Actions', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
1274                        </tr>
1275                    </thead>
1276                    <tbody>
1277                    <?php foreach ( $members as $member ) : ?>
1278                        <?php
1279                        /** @var object{id: string, wp_user_id: string|null, display_name: string, email: string, status: string, resolved_at: string|null, banned_until: string|null} $member */
1280                        $app_id     = (int) $member->id;
1281                        $is_banned  = 'banned' === $member->status;
1282                        $status_col = $is_banned ? '#c0392b' : '#0a7c48';
1283                        $status_lbl = $is_banned
1284                            ? ( $member->banned_until
1285                                ? sprintf(
1286                                    /* translators: %s: date until which the artist is banned */
1287                                    __( 'Banned until %s', 'agnosis' ),
1288                                    date_i18n( get_option( 'date_format' ), strtotime( $member->banned_until ) )
1289                                )
1290                                : __( 'Banned', 'agnosis' ) )
1291                            : __( 'Active', 'agnosis' );
1292                        ?>
1293                        <tr>
1294                            <td>
1295                                <strong><?php echo esc_html( $member->display_name ); ?></strong><br>
1296                                <span style="color:#666;font-size:12px"><?php echo esc_html( $member->email ); ?></span>
1297                            </td>
1298                            <td>
1299                                <span style="color:<?php echo esc_attr( $status_col ); ?>;font-weight:600;font-size:12px">
1300                                    <?php echo esc_html( $status_lbl ); ?>
1301                                </span>
1302                            </td>
1303                            <td style="white-space:nowrap;font-size:12px">
1304                                <?php echo $member->resolved_at ? esc_html( date_i18n( get_option( 'date_format' ), strtotime( $member->resolved_at ) ) ) : '—'; ?>
1305                            </td>
1306                            <td style="white-space:nowrap">
1307                                <?php if ( ! $is_banned ) : ?>
1308                                    <!-- Temporary ban -->
1309                                    <form method="post" action="<?php echo esc_url( admin_url( 'admin-post.php' ) ); ?>"
1310                                          style="display:inline;margin-right:4px"
1311                                          onsubmit="return this.querySelector('[name=banned_until]').value !== '' || confirm('<?php echo esc_js( __( 'Leave the date blank to ban indefinitely. Continue?', 'agnosis' ) ); ?>')">
1312                                        <input type="hidden" name="action" value="agnosis_ban_artist">
1313                                        <input type="hidden" name="application_id" value="<?php echo esc_attr( (string) $app_id ); ?>">
1314                                        <input type="date" name="banned_until" style="font-size:12px;padding:2px 4px"
1315                                               min="<?php echo esc_attr( gmdate( 'Y-m-d', strtotime( '+1 day' ) ) ); ?>"
1316                                               title="<?php esc_attr_e( 'Leave blank to ban indefinitely', 'agnosis' ); ?>">
1317                                        <?php wp_nonce_field( 'agnosis_ban_' . $app_id, 'agnosis_nonce' ); ?>
1318                                        <?php submit_button( __( 'Suspend', 'agnosis' ), 'small', 'submit', false ); ?>
1319                                    </form>
1320                                <?php endif; ?>
1321                                <!-- Permanent delete -->
1322                                <form method="post" action="<?php echo esc_url( admin_url( 'admin-post.php' ) ); ?>"
1323                                      style="display:inline;margin-right:4px"
1324                                      onsubmit="return confirm('<?php echo esc_js( __( 'Permanently delete this artist and all their content? This cannot be undone.', 'agnosis' ) ); ?>')">
1325                                    <input type="hidden" name="action" value="agnosis_delete_artist">
1326                                    <input type="hidden" name="application_id" value="<?php echo esc_attr( (string) $app_id ); ?>">
1327                                    <?php wp_nonce_field( 'agnosis_delete_' . $app_id, 'agnosis_nonce' ); ?>
1328                                    <?php submit_button( __( 'Delete', 'agnosis' ), 'small delete', 'submit', false ); ?>
1329                                </form>
1330                                <?php if ( ! $is_banned ) : ?>
1331                                    <!-- Initiate community vote -->
1332                                    <form method="post" action="<?php echo esc_url( admin_url( 'admin-post.php' ) ); ?>"
1333                                          style="display:inline"
1334                                          onsubmit="return confirm('<?php echo esc_js( __( 'Open a community removal vote for this artist? All members will be emailed.', 'agnosis' ) ); ?>')">
1335                                        <input type="hidden" name="action" value="agnosis_initiate_removal_vote">
1336                                        <input type="hidden" name="application_id" value="<?php echo esc_attr( (string) $app_id ); ?>">
1337                                        <?php wp_nonce_field( 'agnosis_vote_' . $app_id, 'agnosis_nonce' ); ?>
1338                                        <?php submit_button( __( 'Open Vote', 'agnosis' ), 'small', 'submit', false ); ?>
1339                                    </form>
1340                                <?php endif; ?>
1341                            </td>
1342                        </tr>
1343                    <?php endforeach; ?>
1344                    </tbody>
1345                </table>
1346            <?php endif; ?>
1347        </div>
1348        <?php
1349    }
1350
1351    /**
1352     * admin-post handler: suspend (ban) an artist, optionally until a date.
1353     */
1354    public function handle_ban_artist(): void {
1355        $app_id = absint( wp_unslash( $_POST['application_id'] ?? 0 ) );
1356
1357        check_admin_referer( 'agnosis_ban_' . $app_id, 'agnosis_nonce' );
1358
1359        if ( ! current_user_can( 'manage_options' ) ) {
1360            wp_die( esc_html__( 'You do not have permission to perform this action.', 'agnosis' ) );
1361        }
1362
1363        $raw_until = sanitize_text_field( wp_unslash( $_POST['banned_until'] ?? '' ) );
1364        $until     = ( '' !== $raw_until && strtotime( $raw_until ) )
1365            ? ( new \DateTimeImmutable( $raw_until ) )
1366            : null;
1367
1368        $departure = new Departure();
1369        $ok        = $departure->admin_ban( $app_id, $until );
1370
1371        wp_safe_redirect( add_query_arg(
1372            [
1373                'page'            => 'agnosis-settings',
1374                'tab'             => 'network',
1375                'agnosis_message' => $ok ? 'banned' : 'ban_failed',
1376            ],
1377            admin_url( 'admin.php' )
1378        ) );
1379        exit;
1380    }
1381
1382    /**
1383     * admin-post handler: permanently delete an artist and all their content.
1384     */
1385    public function handle_delete_artist(): void {
1386        $app_id = absint( wp_unslash( $_POST['application_id'] ?? 0 ) );
1387
1388        check_admin_referer( 'agnosis_delete_' . $app_id, 'agnosis_nonce' );
1389
1390        if ( ! current_user_can( 'manage_options' ) ) {
1391            wp_die( esc_html__( 'You do not have permission to perform this action.', 'agnosis' ) );
1392        }
1393
1394        $departure = new Departure();
1395        $ok        = $departure->admin_delete( $app_id );
1396
1397        wp_safe_redirect( add_query_arg(
1398            [
1399                'page'            => 'agnosis-settings',
1400                'tab'             => 'network',
1401                'agnosis_message' => $ok ? 'deleted' : 'delete_failed',
1402            ],
1403            admin_url( 'admin.php' )
1404        ) );
1405        exit;
1406    }
1407
1408    /**
1409     * admin-post handler: open a community removal vote for an artist (admin bypass).
1410     */
1411    public function handle_initiate_removal_vote(): void {
1412        $app_id = absint( wp_unslash( $_POST['application_id'] ?? 0 ) );
1413
1414        check_admin_referer( 'agnosis_vote_' . $app_id, 'agnosis_nonce' );
1415
1416        if ( ! current_user_can( 'manage_options' ) ) {
1417            wp_die( esc_html__( 'You do not have permission to perform this action.', 'agnosis' ) );
1418        }
1419
1420        global $wpdb;
1421
1422        // Resolve subject user_id from application.
1423        $user_id = (int) $wpdb->get_var( // phpcs:ignore WordPress.DB.DirectDatabaseQuery.DirectQuery, WordPress.DB.DirectDatabaseQuery.NoCaching
1424            $wpdb->prepare(
1425                "SELECT user_id FROM {$wpdb->prefix}agnosis_applications WHERE id = %d",
1426                $app_id
1427            )
1428        );
1429
1430        if ( ! $user_id ) {
1431            wp_safe_redirect( add_query_arg(
1432                [ 'page' => 'agnosis-settings', 'tab' => 'network', 'agnosis_message' => 'vote_open_failed' ],
1433                admin_url( 'admin.php' )
1434            ) );
1435            exit;
1436        }
1437
1438        $departure = new Departure();
1439        $ok        = $departure->admin_open_removal_vote( $user_id, get_current_user_id() );
1440
1441        wp_safe_redirect( add_query_arg(
1442            [
1443                'page'            => 'agnosis-settings',
1444                'tab'             => 'network',
1445                'agnosis_message' => $ok ? 'vote_opened' : 'vote_open_failed',
1446            ],
1447            admin_url( 'admin.php' )
1448        ) );
1449        exit;
1450    }
1451
1452    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
1453    // Newsletter dashboard (Newsletter tab)
1454    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
1455
1456    private function render_newsletter_dashboard(): void {
1457        // Self-heal a stuck 'Sending…' status the moment an admin views this
1458        // page, rather than only on WP-Cron's next tick — see
1459        // QueueProcessor::reconcile_sending_issues()'s docblock. Cheap (a
1460        // handful of small COUNT queries, no-op when nothing is 'sending').
1461        ( new QueueProcessor() )->reconcile_sending_issues();
1462
1463        // Also re-check the newsletter cron events themselves, unconditionally
1464        // (not just on a version bump) — see
1465        // Activator::ensure_newsletter_cron_scheduled()'s docblock for why:
1466        // found 2026-07-06, a site's agnosis_send_newsletter_queue event was
1467        // missing entirely, so nothing had ever reconciled it in the first
1468        // place. Logged only when something was actually missing, since a
1469        // re-registration happening at all is itself worth knowing about.
1470        if ( Activator::ensure_newsletter_cron_scheduled() ) {
1471            Logger::warning( 'Newsletter dashboard view found a missing newsletter cron event and re-registered it.', 'newsletter' );
1472        }
1473
1474        $scheduler        = new Scheduler();
1475        $sub_counts       = Subscriber::counts();
1476        $threshold        = (int) get_option( 'agnosis_newsletter_subscriber_warn_threshold', 250 );
1477        $artist_query     = new \WP_User_Query( [ 'role' => 'agnosis_artist', 'count_total' => true, 'number' => 0, 'fields' => 'ID' ] );
1478        $artist_total     = (int) $artist_query->get_total();
1479        $optout_query     = new \WP_User_Query( [
1480            'role'       => 'agnosis_artist',
1481            'count_total' => true,
1482            'number'     => 0,
1483            'fields'     => 'ID',
1484            'meta_key'   => '_agnosis_newsletter_optout', // phpcs:ignore WordPress.DB.SlowDBQuery.slow_db_query_meta_key -- small table (admitted artists only).
1485            'meta_value' => '1', // phpcs:ignore WordPress.DB.SlowDBQuery.slow_db_query_meta_value
1486        ] );
1487        $artist_optouts   = (int) $optout_query->get_total();
1488
1489        ?>
1490        <div class="card" style="max-width:900px;margin-top:1.5rem;padding:1rem 1.5rem">
1491            <h2 style="margin-top:0"><?php esc_html_e( 'Newsletter Status', 'agnosis' ); ?></h2>
1492
1493            <?php if ( $sub_counts['confirmed'] > $threshold ) : ?>
1494                <div class="notice notice-warning inline" style="margin:0 0 1rem">
1495                    <p>
1496                        <?php
1497                        echo esc_html(
1498                            sprintf(
1499                                /* translators: 1: confirmed public subscriber count, 2: configured comfort threshold */
1500                                __( 'You have %1$d confirmed public subscribers, above the configured comfort threshold of %2$d. Self-hosted sending still works, but you may want to connect an email service provider (e.g. Brevo\'s free tier) for better deliverability at this size.', 'agnosis' ),
1501                                (int) $sub_counts['confirmed'],
1502                                (int) $threshold
1503                            )
1504                        );
1505                        ?>
1506                    </p>
1507                </div>
1508            <?php endif; ?>
1509
1510            <table class="widefat striped" style="border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:1.5rem">
1511                <thead><tr>
1512                    <th><?php esc_html_e( 'Newsletter', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
1513                    <th><?php esc_html_e( 'Audience', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
1514                    <th><?php esc_html_e( 'Last sent', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
1515                    <th><?php esc_html_e( 'Status', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
1516                    <th><?php esc_html_e( 'Action', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
1517                    <th><?php esc_html_e( 'Send a test', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
1518                </tr></thead>
1519                <tbody>
1520                    <tr>
1521                        <td><strong><?php esc_html_e( 'Artist', 'agnosis' ); ?></strong></td>
1522                        <td>
1523                            <?php
1524                            echo esc_html(
1525                                sprintf(
1526                                    /* translators: 1: admitted artist count, 2: how many of them opted out */
1527                                    __( '%1$d admitted (%2$d opted out)', 'agnosis' ),
1528                                    $artist_total,
1529                                    $artist_optouts
1530                                )
1531                            );
1532                            ?>
1533                        </td>
1534                        <td><?php echo esc_html( $this->format_last_sent( $scheduler->last_sent_at( 'artist' ) ) ); ?></td>
1535                        <td><?php echo $scheduler->has_issue_in_flight( 'artist' ) ? esc_html__( 'Sending…', 'agnosis' ) : esc_html__( 'Idle', 'agnosis' ); ?></td>
1536                        <td>
1537                            <form method="post" action="<?php echo esc_url( admin_url( 'admin-post.php' ) ); ?>">
1538                                <input type="hidden" name="action" value="agnosis_send_newsletter_now">
1539                                <input type="hidden" name="newsletter_type" value="artist">
1540                                <?php wp_nonce_field( 'agnosis_send_newsletter_artist' ); ?>
1541                                <?php submit_button( __( 'Send Now', 'agnosis' ), 'small', 'submit', false, $scheduler->has_issue_in_flight( 'artist' ) ? [ 'disabled' => 'disabled' ] : [] ); ?>
1542                            </form>
1543                        </td>
1544                        <td><?php $this->render_newsletter_test_form( 'artist' ); ?></td>
1545                    </tr>
1546                    <tr>
1547                        <td><strong><?php esc_html_e( 'Public', 'agnosis' ); ?></strong></td>
1548                        <td>
1549                            <?php
1550                            echo esc_html(
1551                                sprintf(
1552                                    /* translators: 1: confirmed subscriber count, 2: pending confirmation count, 3: unsubscribed count */
1553                                    __( '%1$d confirmed, %2$d pending confirmation, %3$d unsubscribed', 'agnosis' ),
1554                                    (int) $sub_counts['confirmed'],
1555                                    (int) $sub_counts['pending'],
1556                                    (int) $sub_counts['unsubscribed']
1557                                )
1558                            );
1559                            ?>
1560                            <?php $locale_breakdown = $this->format_locale_breakdown(); ?>
1561                            <?php if ( '' !== $locale_breakdown ) : ?>
1562                                <div style="margin-top:.4rem;font-size:.85em;color:#666">
1563                                    <?php
1564                                    printf(
1565                                        /* translators: %s: comma-separated "Language (count)" breakdown of confirmed subscribers */
1566                                        esc_html__( 'By language: %s', 'agnosis' ),
1567                                        esc_html( $locale_breakdown )
1568                                    );
1569                                    ?>
1570                                </div>
1571                            <?php endif; ?>
1572                        </td>
1573                        <td><?php echo esc_html( $this->format_last_sent( $scheduler->last_sent_at( 'public' ) ) ); ?></td>
1574                        <td><?php echo $scheduler->has_issue_in_flight( 'public' ) ? esc_html__( 'Sending…', 'agnosis' ) : esc_html__( 'Idle', 'agnosis' ); ?></td>
1575                        <td>
1576                            <form method="post" action="<?php echo esc_url( admin_url( 'admin-post.php' ) ); ?>">
1577                                <input type="hidden" name="action" value="agnosis_send_newsletter_now">
1578                                <input type="hidden" name="newsletter_type" value="public">
1579                                <?php wp_nonce_field( 'agnosis_send_newsletter_public' ); ?>
1580                                <?php submit_button( __( 'Send Now', 'agnosis' ), 'small', 'submit', false, $scheduler->has_issue_in_flight( 'public' ) ? [ 'disabled' => 'disabled' ] : [] ); ?>
1581                            </form>
1582                        </td>
1583                        <td><?php $this->render_newsletter_test_form( 'public' ); ?></td>
1584                    </tr>
1585                </tbody>
1586            </table>
1587
1588            <p class="description">
1589                <?php esc_html_e( 'Add the "Newsletter Signup" block to any page to let visitors subscribe to the public newsletter. Artists are enrolled automatically and can unsubscribe from any issue with one click.', 'agnosis' ); ?>
1590            </p>
1591        </div>
1592        <?php
1593    }
1594
1595    private function format_last_sent( ?string $mysql_datetime ): string {
1596        if ( ! $mysql_datetime ) {
1597            return __( 'Never', 'agnosis' );
1598        }
1599        return date_i18n( get_option( 'date_format' ), strtotime( $mysql_datetime ) );
1600    }
1601
1602    /**
1603     * Locale-coverage metric (audit §8 — "cheap signal for which LF languages
1604     * earn their AI translation spend"), built on Subscriber::counts_by_locale().
1605     * Returns '' when there are no confirmed subscribers to break down yet.
1606     */
1607    private function format_locale_breakdown(): string {
1608        $by_locale = Subscriber::counts_by_locale();
1609        if ( empty( $by_locale ) ) {
1610            return '';
1611        }
1612
1613        $parts = [];
1614        foreach ( $by_locale as $locale => $count ) {
1615            $parts[] = sprintf( '%1$s (%2$d)', $this->locale_label( $locale ), $count );
1616        }
1617
1618        return implode( ', ', $parts );
1619    }
1620
1621    /**
1622     * Human-readable language name for a subscriber's stored WP locale (e.g.
1623     * 'es_ES' -> 'Spanish'). Uses Lingua Forge's own display-name lookup when
1624     * LF is active — the same optional-dependency guard convention as the
1625     * rest of Compat\LinguaForge — falling back to the raw locale code when
1626     * LF isn't installed. An empty locale (never recorded — e.g. a subscriber
1627     * from before the §3c frontend.js fix) is labelled explicitly rather than
1628     * silently dropped, matching Subscriber::counts_by_locale()'s own '' bucket.
1629     */
1630    private function locale_label( string $locale ): string {
1631        if ( '' === $locale ) {
1632            return __( 'Unknown', 'agnosis' );
1633        }
1634
1635        if ( function_exists( 'linguaforge_language_label' ) ) {
1636            return (string) linguaforge_language_label( LinguaForge::locale_to_lang( $locale ) );
1637        }
1638
1639        return $locale;
1640    }
1641
1642    /**
1643     * Inline "send a preview to one address" form for the Newsletter dashboard.
1644     *
1645     * Defaults to the current admin's own email. Sending a test does not touch
1646     * the schedule, the issues table, or any subscriber — see Scheduler::send_test().
1647     */
1648    private function render_newsletter_test_form( string $type ): void {
1649        $current_user = wp_get_current_user();
1650        ?>
1651        <form method="post" action="<?php echo esc_url( admin_url( 'admin-post.php' ) ); ?>" style="display:flex;gap:.4rem;align-items:center">
1652            <input type="hidden" name="action" value="agnosis_send_newsletter_test">
1653            <input type="hidden" name="newsletter_type" value="<?php echo esc_attr( $type ); ?>">
1654            <?php wp_nonce_field( 'agnosis_send_newsletter_test_' . $type ); ?>
1655            <input type="email" name="test_email" value="<?php echo esc_attr( $current_user->user_email ); ?>" required class="small-text" style="width:14rem">
1656            <?php submit_button( __( 'Send Test', 'agnosis' ), 'secondary small', 'submit', false ); ?>
1657        </form>
1658        <?php
1659    }
1660
1661    /**
1662     * admin-post handler: manually trigger a newsletter issue right now.
1663     */
1664    public function handle_send_newsletter_now(): void {
1665        $type = sanitize_key( wp_unslash( $_POST['newsletter_type'] ?? '' ) );
1666
1667        check_admin_referer( 'agnosis_send_newsletter_' . $type );
1668
1669        if ( ! current_user_can( 'manage_options' ) ) {
1670            wp_die( esc_html__( 'You do not have permission to perform this action.', 'agnosis' ) );
1671        }
1672
1673        $scheduler = new Scheduler();
1674        $result    = $scheduler->send_now( $type );
1675
1676        wp_safe_redirect( add_query_arg(
1677            [
1678                'page'            => 'agnosis-settings',
1679                'tab'             => 'newsletter',
1680                'agnosis_message' => true === $result ? 'newsletter_sent' : 'newsletter_send_failed',
1681            ],
1682            admin_url( 'admin.php' )
1683        ) );
1684        exit;
1685    }
1686
1687    /**
1688     * admin-post handler: send a one-off preview of the next issue to a single
1689     * address. Does not touch the schedule, issues table, or any subscriber.
1690     */
1691    public function handle_send_newsletter_test(): void {
1692        $type = sanitize_key( wp_unslash( $_POST['newsletter_type'] ?? '' ) );
1693
1694        check_admin_referer( 'agnosis_send_newsletter_test_' . $type );
1695
1696        if ( ! current_user_can( 'manage_options' ) ) {
1697            wp_die( esc_html__( 'You do not have permission to perform this action.', 'agnosis' ) );
1698        }
1699
1700        $test_email = sanitize_email( wp_unslash( $_POST['test_email'] ?? '' ) );
1701
1702        $scheduler = new Scheduler();
1703        $result    = $scheduler->send_test( $type, $test_email );
1704
1705        wp_safe_redirect( add_query_arg(
1706            [
1707                'page'            => 'agnosis-settings',
1708                'tab'             => 'newsletter',
1709                'agnosis_message' => true === $result ? 'newsletter_test_sent' : 'newsletter_test_failed',
1710            ],
1711            admin_url( 'admin.php' )
1712        ) );
1713        exit;
1714    }
1715
1716    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
1717    // Invite an artist (Artist\Invitation — separate from the newsletter system:
1718    // one ad-hoc recipient, no list, no queue, nothing tracked)
1719    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
1720
1721    /**
1722     * "Invite an Artist" card — a single-recipient, language-selectable
1723     * invitation email, independent of the newsletter dashboard above it.
1724     */
1725    private function render_invitation_card(): void {
1726        $languages = SubmissionTranslator::language_names();
1727        ksort( $languages );
1728        $current_user = wp_get_current_user();
1729        ?>
1730        <div class="card" style="max-width:900px;margin-top:1.5rem;padding:1rem 1.5rem">
1731            <h2 style="margin-top:0"><?php esc_html_e( 'Invite an Artist', 'agnosis' ); ?></h2>
1732            <p class="description" style="margin-top:0">
1733                <?php esc_html_e( 'Send a one-off email inviting someone to apply. Nothing is tracked or scheduled — this sends immediately to the address below.', 'agnosis' ); ?>
1734            </p>
1735
1736            <form method="post" action="<?php echo esc_url( admin_url( 'admin-post.php' ) ); ?>" style="display:flex;gap:.6rem;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:.8rem">
1737                <input type="hidden" name="action" value="agnosis_send_invitation">
1738                <?php wp_nonce_field( 'agnosis_send_invitation' ); ?>
1739                <input type="email" name="invitation_email" placeholder="<?php esc_attr_e( 'artist@example.com', 'agnosis' ); ?>" required class="regular-text" style="width:16rem">
1740                <select name="invitation_language">
1741                    <?php foreach ( $languages as $code => $label ) : ?>
1742                        <option value="<?php echo esc_attr( (string) $code ); ?>"><?php echo esc_html( $label ); ?></option>
1743                    <?php endforeach; ?>
1744                </select>
1745                <?php submit_button( __( 'Send Invitation', 'agnosis' ), 'primary small', 'submit', false ); ?>
1746            </form>
1747
1748            <form method="post" action="<?php echo esc_url( admin_url( 'admin-post.php' ) ); ?>" style="display:flex;gap:.6rem;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap">
1749                <input type="hidden" name="action" value="agnosis_send_invitation_test">
1750                <?php wp_nonce_field( 'agnosis_send_invitation_test' ); ?>
1751                <input type="email" name="invitation_test_email" value="<?php echo esc_attr( $current_user->user_email ); ?>" required class="regular-text" style="width:16rem">
1752                <select name="invitation_language">
1753                    <?php foreach ( $languages as $code => $label ) : ?>
1754                        <option value="<?php echo esc_attr( (string) $code ); ?>"><?php echo esc_html( $label ); ?></option>
1755                    <?php endforeach; ?>
1756                </select>
1757                <?php submit_button( __( 'Send Test', 'agnosis' ), 'secondary small', 'submit', false ); ?>
1758            </form>
1759        </div>
1760        <?php
1761    }
1762
1763    /**
1764     * admin-post handler: send a real invitation.
1765     */
1766    public function handle_send_invitation(): void {
1767        check_admin_referer( 'agnosis_send_invitation' );
1768
1769        if ( ! current_user_can( 'manage_options' ) ) {
1770            wp_die( esc_html__( 'You do not have permission to perform this action.', 'agnosis' ) );
1771        }
1772
1773        $email    = sanitize_email( wp_unslash( $_POST['invitation_email'] ?? '' ) );
1774        $language = sanitize_key( wp_unslash( $_POST['invitation_language'] ?? '' ) );
1775
1776        $result = ( new Invitation() )->send( $email, $language );
1777
1778        wp_safe_redirect( add_query_arg(
1779            [
1780                'page'            => 'agnosis-settings',
1781                'tab'             => 'newsletter',
1782                'agnosis_message' => true === $result ? 'invitation_sent' : 'invitation_failed',
1783            ],
1784            admin_url( 'admin.php' )
1785        ) );
1786        exit;
1787    }
1788
1789    /**
1790     * admin-post handler: send a preview of the invitation to one address.
1791     */
1792    public function handle_send_invitation_test(): void {
1793        check_admin_referer( 'agnosis_send_invitation_test' );
1794
1795        if ( ! current_user_can( 'manage_options' ) ) {
1796            wp_die( esc_html__( 'You do not have permission to perform this action.', 'agnosis' ) );
1797        }
1798
1799        $email    = sanitize_email( wp_unslash( $_POST['invitation_test_email'] ?? '' ) );
1800        $language = sanitize_key( wp_unslash( $_POST['invitation_language'] ?? '' ) );
1801
1802        $result = ( new Invitation() )->send_test( $email, $language );
1803
1804        wp_safe_redirect( add_query_arg(
1805            [
1806                'page'            => 'agnosis-settings',
1807                'tab'             => 'newsletter',
1808                'agnosis_message' => true === $result ? 'invitation_test_sent' : 'invitation_test_failed',
1809            ],
1810            admin_url( 'admin.php' )
1811        ) );
1812        exit;
1813    }
1814
1815    private function ai_test_js(): string {
1816        $ajax_url = esc_js( admin_url( 'admin-ajax.php' ) );
1817        return sprintf(
1818            "document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {\n"
1819            . "\tvar btn = e.target.closest('.agnosis-test-ai');\n"
1820            . "\tif (!btn) return;\n"
1821            . "\tvar provider = btn.dataset.provider;\n"
1822            . "\tvar nonce    = btn.dataset.nonce;\n"
1823            . "\tvar result   = document.querySelector('.agnosis-test-result[data-provider=\"' + provider + '\"]');\n"
1824            . "\tif (!result) return;\n"
1825            . "\n"
1826            . "\tbtn.disabled = true;\n"
1827            . "\tresult.style.color = '#666';\n"
1828            . "\tresult.textContent = 'Testing…';\n"
1829            . "\n"
1830            . "\tvar body = new URLSearchParams({ action: 'agnosis_test_ai', provider: provider, nonce: nonce });\n"
1831            . "\tfetch('%s', { method: 'POST', credentials: 'same-origin', body: body })\n"
1832            . "\t\t.then(function(r) { return r.json(); })\n"
1833            . "\t\t.then(function(res) {\n"
1834            . "\t\t\tif (res && res.success) {\n"
1835            . "\t\t\t\tresult.style.color = '#0a7c48';\n"
1836            . "\t\t\t\tresult.textContent = '✓ ' + ((res.data && res.data.message) || 'OK');\n"
1837            . "\t\t\t} else {\n"
1838            . "\t\t\t\tresult.style.color = '#c0392b';\n"
1839            . "\t\t\t\tresult.textContent = '✗ ' + ((res.data && res.data.message) || 'Request failed');\n"
1840            . "\t\t\t}\n"
1841            . "\t\t})\n"
1842            . "\t\t.catch(function() {\n"
1843            . "\t\t\tresult.style.color = '#c0392b';\n"
1844            . "\t\t\tresult.textContent = '✗ Request failed';\n"
1845            . "\t\t})\n"
1846            . "\t\t.finally(function() { btn.disabled = false; });\n"
1847            . '});',
1848            $ajax_url
1849        );
1850    }
1851
1852    /**
1853     * Wires up every `.agnosis-media-field` on the page (currently just the
1854     * Email logo field, but written to support more than one) to the core
1855     * media modal via `wp.media()`. Vanilla JS delegated off document clicks —
1856     * same pattern as ai_test_js() — since wp.media() itself is the only part
1857     * of this that actually needs the media-editor script WordPress core
1858     * already ships, not jQuery directly.
1859     */
1860    private function media_picker_js(): string {
1861        return "document.addEventListener('click', function (e) {\n"
1862            . "\tvar removeBtn = e.target.closest('.agnosis-media-remove');\n"
1863            . "\tif (removeBtn) {\n"
1864            . "\t\tvar removeWrap = removeBtn.closest('.agnosis-media-field');\n"
1865            . "\t\tremoveWrap.querySelector('.agnosis-media-field__id').value = '';\n"
1866            . "\t\tremoveWrap.querySelector('.agnosis-media-field__preview').style.display = 'none';\n"
1867            . "\t\tremoveBtn.style.display = 'none';\n"
1868            . "\t\treturn;\n"
1869            . "\t}\n"
1870            . "\n"
1871            . "\tvar selectBtn = e.target.closest('.agnosis-media-select');\n"
1872            . "\tif (!selectBtn) return;\n"
1873            . "\te.preventDefault();\n"
1874            . "\n"
1875            . "\tvar wrap = selectBtn.closest('.agnosis-media-field');\n"
1876            . "\tvar frame = wp.media({\n"
1877            . "\t\ttitle: 'Select Image',\n"
1878            . "\t\tbutton: { text: 'Use this image' },\n"
1879            . "\t\tlibrary: { type: 'image' },\n"
1880            . "\t\tmultiple: false\n"
1881            . "\t});\n"
1882            . "\n"
1883            . "\tframe.on('select', function () {\n"
1884            . "\t\tvar attachment = frame.state().get('selection').first().toJSON();\n"
1885            . "\t\twrap.querySelector('.agnosis-media-field__id').value = attachment.id;\n"
1886            . "\n"
1887            . "\t\tvar previewWrap = wrap.querySelector('.agnosis-media-field__preview');\n"
1888            . "\t\tvar img = previewWrap.querySelector('img');\n"
1889            . "\t\timg.src = (attachment.sizes && attachment.sizes.medium) ? attachment.sizes.medium.url : attachment.url;\n"
1890            . "\t\tpreviewWrap.style.display = 'block';\n"
1891            . "\n"
1892            . "\t\twrap.querySelector('.agnosis-media-remove').style.display = 'inline-block';\n"
1893            . "\t});\n"
1894            . "\n"
1895            . "\tframe.open();\n"
1896            . '});';
1897    }
1898
1899    private function admin_css(): string {
1900        return '
1901        .agnosis-settings h1 { display:flex; align-items:baseline; gap:.4rem; }
1902        .agnosis-settings .nav-tab-active { border-bottom-color:#7c6af7; color:#7c6af7; }
1903        ';
1904    }
1905
1906    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
1907    // admin_post / wp_ajax handlers
1908    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
1909
1910    /** AJAX handler — ping an AI provider with a minimal request. */
1911    public function handle_test_ai(): void {
1912        check_ajax_referer( 'agnosis_test_ai', 'nonce' );
1913
1914        if ( ! current_user_can( 'manage_options' ) ) {
1915            wp_send_json_error( [ 'message' => __( 'Permission denied.', 'agnosis' ) ] );
1916        }
1917
1918        $provider = sanitize_key( wp_unslash( $_POST['provider'] ?? '' ) ); // phpcs:ignore WordPress.Security.ValidatedSanitizedInput.InputNotSanitized
1919
1920        switch ( $provider ) {
1921
1922            case 'openai':
1923                $key = (string) get_option( 'agnosis_openai_api_key', '' );
1924                if ( empty( $key ) ) {
1925                    wp_send_json_error( [ 'message' => __( 'OpenAI API key not configured.', 'agnosis' ) ] );
1926                }
1927                $this->ping_provider(
1928                    'https://api.openai.com/v1/chat/completions',
1929                    [ 'Authorization' => 'Bearer ' . $key, 'Content-Type' => 'application/json' ],
1930                    [ 'model' => 'gpt-4o-mini', 'messages' => [ [ 'role' => 'user', 'content' => 'Reply with the single word: ping' ] ], 'max_tokens' => 5 ],
1931                    __( 'OpenAI connection successful.', 'agnosis' )
1932                );
1933                // no break — ping_provider() always calls wp_send_json_* → wp_die().
1934
1935            case 'anthropic':
1936                $key = (string) get_option( 'agnosis_anthropic_api_key', '' );
1937                if ( empty( $key ) ) {
1938                    wp_send_json_error( [ 'message' => __( 'Anthropic API key not configured.', 'agnosis' ) ] );
1939                }
1940                $this->ping_provider(
1941                    'https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages',
1942                    [ 'x-api-key' => $key, 'anthropic-version' => '2023-06-01', 'Content-Type' => 'application/json' ],
1943                    [ 'model' => 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001', 'max_tokens' => 5, 'messages' => [ [ 'role' => 'user', 'content' => 'Reply with the single word: ping' ] ] ],
1944                    __( 'Anthropic connection successful.', 'agnosis' )
1945                );
1946                // no break — ping_provider() always calls wp_send_json_* → wp_die().
1947
1948            case 'wp_ai':
1949                if ( ! function_exists( 'wp_ai_client_prompt' ) ) {
1950                    wp_send_json_error( [ 'message' => __( 'WordPress AI Client requires WordPress 7.0 or later.', 'agnosis' ) ] );
1951                }
1952                // call_user_func avoids Plugin Check static-analysis flag.
1953                // @phpstan-ignore-next-line
1954                $builder = call_user_func( 'wp_ai_client_prompt', 'ping' );
1955                if ( ! $builder->is_supported_for_text_generation() ) {
1956                    wp_send_json_error( [ 'message' => __( 'No text-generation model configured. Set one up under Settings → Connectors.', 'agnosis' ) ] );
1957                }
1958                wp_send_json_success( [ 'message' => __( 'WordPress AI Client is available and a text-generation model is configured.', 'agnosis' ) ] );
1959                // no break — wp_send_json_success() calls wp_die().
1960
1961            default:
1962                wp_send_json_error( [ 'message' => __( 'Unknown provider.', 'agnosis' ) ] );
1963        }
1964    }
1965
1966    /**
1967     * POST to an AI provider endpoint and send a JSON response.
1968     *
1969     * Encodes $body as JSON, POSTs to $url with $headers, then:
1970     *  - Calls wp_send_json_error() on transport failure or non-200 status.
1971     *  - Calls wp_send_json_success() on 200.
1972     *
1973     * Both wp_send_json_* functions call wp_die(), so this method never returns.
1974     *
1975     * @param string               $url         Provider API endpoint.
1976     * @param array<string,string> $headers     Request headers (auth + Content-Type).
1977     * @param array<string,mixed>  $body        Request payload (JSON-encoded before sending).
1978     * @param string               $success_msg Localised success message shown to the admin.
1979     */
1980    private function ping_provider( string $url, array $headers, array $body, string $success_msg ): void {
1981        $json_body = wp_json_encode( $body );
1982        $response  = wp_remote_post( $url, [
1983            'timeout' => 10,
1984            'headers' => $headers,
1985            'body'    => false !== $json_body ? $json_body : '{}',
1986        ] );
1987
1988        if ( is_wp_error( $response ) ) {
1989            wp_send_json_error( [ 'message' => $response->get_error_message() ] );
1990        }
1991
1992        $code = (int) wp_remote_retrieve_response_code( $response );
1993        if ( 200 !== $code ) {
1994            $resp_body = json_decode( wp_remote_retrieve_body( $response ), true );
1995            /* translators: %d: HTTP response status code */
1996            $msg = $resp_body['error']['message'] ?? sprintf( __( 'HTTP %d', 'agnosis' ), $code );
1997            wp_send_json_error( [ 'message' => $msg ] );
1998        }
1999
2000        wp_send_json_success( [ 'message' => $success_msg ] );
2001    }
2002
2003    /** admin_post handler — clear all pipeline log entries. */
2004    public function handle_clear_logs(): void {
2005        check_admin_referer( 'agnosis_clear_logs' );
2006
2007        if ( ! current_user_can( 'manage_options' ) ) {
2008            wp_die( esc_html__( 'You do not have permission to perform this action.', 'agnosis' ) );
2009        }
2010
2011        Logger::clear();
2012
2013        wp_safe_redirect(
2014            add_query_arg(
2015                [ 'page' => 'agnosis-settings', 'tab' => 'logs', 'cleared' => '1' ],
2016                admin_url( 'admin.php' )
2017            )
2018        );
2019        exit;
2020    }
2021}

Legend

Covered by small (and larger) testsCovered by medium (and large) testsCovered by large tests (and tests of unknown size)Not coveredNot coverable
